scripts.lint: eslint src scripts plugins tests projects html-prototype-shell vite.config.js vitest.config.js playwright.config.js
scripts.format: prettier --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern --write src/config src/components/ui src/components/AppShell.vue src/components/ProjectPortal.vue src/composables src/router src/layouts src/services/project-assets.js src/services/project-sources.js src/services/page-prd-links.js src/views/auth src/views/docs src/views/mobile src/views/system src/views/tools src/views/HomeView.vue plugins scripts/generate-page.mjs scripts/validate-project-packages.mjs tests projects/*/page-definitions.js projects/*/page-prd-links.js templates/project-package vitest.config.js eslint.config.js vite.config.js
scripts.format:check: prettier --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern --check src/config src/components/ui src/components/AppShell.vue src/components/ProjectPortal.vue src/composables src/router src/layouts src/services/project-assets.js src/services/project-sources.js src/services/page-prd-links.js src/views/auth src/views/docs src/views/mobile src/views/system src/views/tools src/views/HomeView.vue plugins scripts/generate-page.mjs scripts/validate-project-packages.mjs tests projects/*/page-definitions.js projects/*/page-prd-links.js templates/project-package vitest.config.js eslint.config.js vite.config.js
scripts.audit:all: npm run audit:projects && npm run audit:views && npm run audit:styles && npm run audit:components && npm run audit:theme && npm run audit:naming && npm run audit:i18n && node scripts/audit-page-fidelity.cjs
scripts.quality:check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run audit:all && npm run build
scripts.ci:check: npm run quality:check && npm run test:unit && npm run test:smoke
